prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-OTRSCMP-STD-YLLW-2 Product Type: SLEEPING_MAT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Single Person Foam Sleeping Pad Thermal Heat Retention Camping Mat Description: ASR Outdoor EVA Thermal Foam Camping Mat would be considered a deluxe version of the ever-so-common eva foam sleeping pad camping mat. This single person foam sleeping pad offers an added barrier of comfort between yourself and the hard ground that you are sleeping under during your outdoor adventure.

The main advantage to the cold weather sleeping pad is the added mylar covering to the top layer of sleeping pad it self; this will assist in retaining warmth and distribute it evenly throughout the mat back to your body as you lay at rest, making cold weather camping more enjoyable.

There are two adjustable elastic straps which allows the unit to be self contained and easily transportable, stow-able, and readily available when needed.

Package Includes: (1) Thermal Camping Mat Sleeping Pad Search Terms: thermal blanket backpacking r value sleep mat winter camping hiking gear accessory comfortable camping foam closed cell sleeping pad adult Features: - One side thermal mylar insulating layer to aid in heat retention while acting as a barrier from ground cold; ideal for use while cold weather camping in the wilderness - Other side EVA foam padded material for added comfort - Good moisture barrier between you and the ground; dust proof; water resistant - Dimensions: 71" x 20" x 0.25" H; Weight: 8 ounces - Thermal foam sleeping pad has 2 elastic straps to compress for storage and attach for backpacking === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Single Person Foam Sleeping Pad Yellow
